news.t: Rareview Capital and Tuttle Capital Management Launch 2X Bull Cryptocurrency & Precious Metals ETF

overview.description: The Rareview 2x Bull Cryptocurrency & Precious Metals ETF (BEGS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in swaps on bitcoin, ether, gold, and silver ETPs. The fund uses leverage to stack the total return of holdings in its crypto asset strategy with total returns of holdings in its precious metals strategy. BEGS was launched on Feb 4, 2025 and is issued by Rareview Funds.
